title: Move installer aggregate progress to bottom and add per-step progress indicators
acceptanceCriteria: Aggregate step-count progress bar renders near the bottom of the interactive installer progress screen.
Each install step renders an ASCII-safe local progress indicator below the step label/detail.
Progress UI changes do not alter installer execution semantics or non-interactive output.
Reusable prompt artifact is added under .agent/prompts/.
Targeted renderer/runtime tests and build/lint verification are recorded.
